title: Readonly properties are silently skipped instead of copied
body: copyObjectProperty() returns early when isReadOnly() is true, so PHP 8.1 readonly properties keep pointing at the original nested object after DeepCopy::copy(), which breaks matchers that expect a full deep clone.

title: DoctrineCollectionFilter triggers a DB round trip mid-clone
body: DoctrineCollectionFilter::apply() assumes the Doctrine collection is already initialized; copying an entity whose lazy collection was never touched forces an extra query in the middle of what should be an in-memory copy.

title: No TypeMatcher example for SplStack/SplQueue
body: There's a SplDoublyLinkedListFilter but the docs/examples don't show how to build a TypeMatcher that also catches SplStack and SplQueue, which extend SplDoublyLinkedList but aren't obviously covered.

title: PropertyTypeMatcher doesn't match PHP union types
body: PropertyTypeMatcher::matches() compares against a single declared type string, so properties declared with a PHP 8 union type such as int|string never match, even when one branch of the union is the intended type.
